name: Green Chili Con Carne
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 c Cored, seeded green peppers, cut into 1-inch cubes
3 cups Drained canned Mexican-style tomatoes (green tomatoes, or use peeled, seeded and chopped ripe tomatoes)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the pork into 1 1/2-inch cubes.
2. Heat the oil in a pressure cooker. When hot, add about one-third of the meat cubes and cook, stirring, until nicely browned.
3. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the cubes to a platter. Add another third of the meat cubes and brown them. Transfer these to the platter. Brown the remaining meat cubes and transfer them to the platter.
4. Add the green peppers to the fat remaining in the cooker and cook until wilted. Add the garlic and cook for about 5 seconds, stirring.
5. Return the meat cubes to the cooker. Add the remaining ingredients and mix well. Cover with the lid and add the pressure regulator. Cook under high pressure for 20 minutes.
6. Release the pressure according to the manufacturer's instructions. Cook, uncovered, for about 10 more minutes or until the sauce is reduced slightly. Serve with cumin rice.
